sources.title: SEC EDGAR - Space Exploration Technologies Corp filings (recommended verification source)
sources.snippet: Unable to access — tool unavailable. Recommended for manual verification of any S-1 or registration statement filings.

key_facts: SpaceX (Space Exploration Technologies Corp) has been one of the most anticipated IPO candidates, with Elon Musk historically deferring a public listing until Starship operations matured.
As of early-to-mid 2025, SpaceX's secondary market valuation was approximately $180–$210 billion.
The more commonly discussed IPO path was a Starlink spin-off/carve-out rather than a full SpaceX IPO.
Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley were frequently reported as likely lead underwriters.
Musk reportedly softened his anti-IPO stance during 2024–2025, with multiple outlets reporting potential 2025–2026 timing.

CRITICAL CAVEAT: All web research tools were unavailable. I cannot confirm whether any S-1 filing, roadshow, or prospectus activity has occurred as of May 2026. These findings are based on pre-cutoff training data only.
